content: Geometry columns use customType — all spatial ops via raw SQL (ST_AsGeoJSON/ST_GeomFromGeoJSON). No wkx/WKB parsing. drizzle-kit generate doesn't understand geometry types so migrations are hand-authored
All PKs are UUIDs except sessions.id which is text (Lucia requirement). Schema changes require typed reversible tested migrations first.

name: Access control helper
description: requireMapAccess(userId, mapId, minRole) in $lib/server/geo/access.ts — owner fast-path (1 select), collaborator path (2 selects). Returns NOT_FOUND for absent access (hides existence), FORBIDDEN for insufficient role

name: typedExecute helper
description: typedExecute<T>(query: SQL) in geo/queries.ts — thin wrapper around db.execute() that centralizes the single unavoidable cast from untyped rows. All raw-SQL queries (features, annotations, bbox) use this instead of inline casts.
